packetManifest.title: Prime Intellect Series A and technical stack source packet
packetManifest.scope: Single bounded packet covering Series A claims and related public artifact references from July 8, 2026.

citation.title: Prime Intellect: The Open Stack for Self-Improving Agents

provenance.method: manual source capture and claim posture labeling

onAccept: Record sourceContract.sourceType, capturedAt, and evidenceGrade without upgrading claim strength.
Mark all mapped Prime Intellect claims as SOURCE_CLAIM unless independently re-verified.
Record EXTERNALLY_REPORTED sources separately (e.g., press coverage).
Preserve DO_NOT_ADOPT_YET for any operational term before HUMMBL/BASEN/Ownward adoption.
onReject: Record packet id, source contract citation, and rejection rationale.
Record the specific field or interpretation mismatch.
Flag any uncited or ambiguous claims as needing LOCAL_AUDIT_REQUIRED.
onCite: Cite underlying source URLs directly and preserve source-posture tags in derivative artifacts.
Do not treat repository or system claims in this packet as HUMMBL canonical guidance.

citationGraphEntry.label: Prime Intellect owned optimization loop and RL stack claims

edges.note: SOURCE_CLAIM: reported specialist spreadsheet subagent performance and environment details.
SOURCE_CLAIM: environment harness and eval/lr RL environment claims.
SOURCE_CLAIM: runtime prerequisites and tested hardware classes.
